description: CompositionMagenta round neck sweater made of 100% acrylic, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis soft sweater from jealous 21 is so plush that it will seem like you never left the comfort of your cosy blanket. Smart enough to wear with a shirt or wear this with leggings or form fitting denims and boots.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
